message:
fix(schema): use SQL-aware statement splitter instead of naive split(';')

The execute_batch function split SQL on raw semicolons, which breaks when
string literals contain semicolons (e.g., VALUES('a;b')). Replace with a
state-machine parser that respects single/double-quoted strings, escaped
quotes, line comments (--), and block comments (/* */). Fixes #157.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
